request: Amend design-ui Stage 0 misroute path to return structured decomposition hints for mixed-lane briefs. Replace the current `final_state: "not_a_design_task"` with a new `final_state: "mixed_brief"` when intent + target_files span lanes; include a `lane_split: [{surface, lane, reason}, ...]` array so the caller can fan out per-surface without re-classifying. Keep the existing `not_a_design_task` return for unambiguous single-lane misroutes. Architecture preserved: design-ui remains single-lane (design only); it NEVER executes non-design lanes. Closes Q-007.
